categories.brand-color-input: Core brand color inputs editable in BrandEditorColors (primary, secondary, accent, background)
categories.brand-color-derived: OKLCH-derived color palettes from brand inputs via org-brand.css relative color syntax
categories.brand-typography-input: Google Font family selections (body, heading) editable in BrandEditorTypography
categories.brand-geometry-input: Radius and density multipliers editable in BrandEditorShape
categories.brand-shadow-input: Shadow scale and color fine-tuning editable in BrandEditorShadows
categories.brand-fine-tune: Level 2 fine-tune tokens stored in tokenOverrides JSON (heading color, text scale, weights, glass tint, card scales)
categories.brand-shader-presets: WebGL shader preset selector stored in tokenOverrides
categories.brand-player-chrome: Player UI chrome colors overridable per-org via tokenOverrides
categories.brand-card-interaction: Card hover/image scale multipliers for interaction polish
categories.brand-hero-visibility: Hero section visibility toggles (not enumerated here - see iter-021)
categories.system-semantic-colors: Platform default color palette (not editable per-org, fallbacks for brand derivation)
categories.system-typography: Text size and weight tokens re-declared at org scope with brand overrides
categories.system-layout: Layout dimensions, container widths, sidebar width

most_consumed_token.name: --brand-color
most_consumed_token.explanation: Primary input that drives OKLCH derivation of primary, interactive, focus, and text-on-brand palettes in org-brand.css

zero_consumers.name: --color-brand-primary-hover
zero_consumers.reason: Defined but not directly consumed; used via relative color math in hover states

zero_consumers.name: --color-brand-primary-active
zero_consumers.reason: Defined but not directly consumed; used via relative color math in active states

zero_consumers.name: --color-brand-primary-subtle
zero_consumers.reason: Defined for palette completeness but no current CSS rule consumes it

conflicting_definitions.note: Single authoritative definition; secondary palette derived via OKLCH in [data-org-brand]

critical_findings: All --brand-* input tokens have single definitions in css-injection.ts and are mapped to CSS custom properties in org-brand.css
Fine-tune tokens (heading-color, text-scale, shadow-scale, etc.) are stored as tokenOverrides JSON in branding_settings.token_overrides, not as dedicated database columns
Spacing scale (--space-1 through --space-24) is universally org-brandable via --brand-density multiplier in [data-org-brand] scope
Typography sizes (--text-xs through --text-4xl) are re-declared and scaled by --text-scale in [data-org-brand]
Player chrome tokens are overridable per-org via tokenOverrides to support custom player UI across different org themes
Dark mode has separate input variables (--brand-color-dark, --brand-secondary-dark, etc.) that are optional; omission triggers auto-derivation from light values
